channel.title: JetBrains IDEs on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in JetBrains IDEs on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Codex as agent provider and agentic enhancements in JetBrains IDEs
item.description:
GitHub added Codex as a new agent provider in public preview. JetBrains IDE updates also include Hooks support in the Customizations editor, richer MCP server management, and custom model support via configuration.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: New features and Claude as agent provider preview in JetBrains IDEs
item.description:
GitHub added support for organization and enterprise agents in JetBrains IDEs, along with Copilot CLI message queueing/steering and a new agent debug logs summary view. The update also previews Claude as an agent provider in JetBrains IDEs.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Introducing Copilot CLI agent and unified sessions view in GitHub Copilot for JetBrains IDEs
item.description:
GitHub Copilot for JetBrains IDEs now includes the Copilot CLI agent and a unified sessions view. The sessions view shows live status for running and queued sessions, and the update also adds an ask… feature.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Inline agent mode in preview and more in GitHub Copilot for JetBrains IDEs
item.description:
GitHub Copilot for JetBrains IDEs adds inline agent mode in preview, along with improvements to Next Edit Suggestions and new controls for approving terminal commands and file edits. The update also introduces global auto-approve and other related enhancements.

  • Source: GitHub
